tEn: Vision-Language Foundation Models as Effective Robot Imitators
tZh: 视觉语言基础模型作为有效的机器人模仿者
sEn: RoboFlamingo, built on OpenFlamingo, achieves state-of-the-art robot manipulation by fine-tuning vision-language models with imitation learning.
sZh: 基于OpenFlamingo的RoboFlamingo通过模仿学习微调视觉语言模型，在机器人操作任务上取得了领先性能。
absEn: Recent progress in vision language foundation models has shown their ability to understand multimodal data and resolve complicated vision language tasks, including robotics manipulation. We seek a straightforward way of making use of existing vision-language models (VLMs) with simple fine-tuning on robotics data. To this end, we derive a simple and novel vision-language manipulation framework, dubbed RoboFlamingo, built upon the open-source VLMs, OpenFlamingo. Unlike prior works, RoboFlamingo utilizes pre-trained VLMs for single-step vision-language comprehension, models sequential history information with an explicit policy head, and is slightly fine-tuned by imitation learning only on language-conditioned manipulation datasets. Such a decomposition provides RoboFlamingo the flexibility for open-loop control and deployment on low-performance platforms. By exceeding the state-of-the-art performance with a large margin on the tested benchmark, we show RoboFlamingo can be an effective and competitive alternative to adapt VLMs to robot control. Our extensive experimental results also reveal several interesting conclusions regarding the behavior of different pre-trained VLMs on manipulation tasks. We believe RoboFlamingo has the potential to be a cost-effective and easy-to-use solution for robotics manipulation, empowering everyone with the ability to fine-tune their own robotics policy.
absZh: 近期视觉语言基础模型的进展表明，它们能够理解多模态数据并解决复杂的视觉语言任务，包括机器人操作。我们寻求一种直接的方式，通过对机器人数据进行简单微调来利用现有的视觉语言模型（VLM）。为此，我们基于开源VLM OpenFlamingo，提出了一个简单而新颖的视觉语言操作框架RoboFlamingo。与先前工作不同，RoboFlamingo利用预训练的VLM进行单步视觉语言理解，通过显式策略头建模序列历史信息，并仅通过模仿学习在语言条件操作数据集上进行轻微微调。这种分解使得RoboFlamingo在开环控制和低性能平台部署上具有灵活性。通过在测试基准上以较大优势超越现有最佳性能，我们展示了RoboFlamingo作为将VLM适应机器人控制的有效且具有竞争力的替代方案。我们广泛的实验结果还揭示了不同预训练VLM在操作任务上的行为的一些有趣结论。我们相信RoboFlamingo有潜力成为机器人操作中成本效益高且易于使用的解决方案，使每个人都能微调自己的机器人策略。

contrib.en: Proposes RoboFlamingo, a simple framework adapting OpenFlamingo VLM to robot manipulation via imitation learning.
contrib.zh: 提出RoboFlamingo，一个通过模仿学习将OpenFlamingo视觉语言模型适配到机器人操作的简单框架。

contrib.en: Decouples vision-language understanding and decision-making with a separate policy head for history modeling.
contrib.zh: 通过独立的策略头解耦视觉语言理解与决策，用于历史信息建模。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on CALVIN benchmark, with 2x improvement over prior methods.
contrib.zh: 在CALVIN基准上取得最优性能，比先前方法提升2倍。

contrib.en: Demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen visual contexts and language instructions.
contrib.zh: 展示了对未见视觉场景和语言指令的零样本泛化能力。

contrib.en: Shows data efficiency: larger VLMs perform better with limited robot demonstration data.
contrib.zh: 展示了数据效率：更大的视觉语言模型在有限机器人演示数据下表现更好。

contrib.en: Enables open-loop control and deployment on single GPU, reducing computational cost.
contrib.zh: 支持开环控制和单GPU部署，降低计算成本。

limits.en: Evaluated only in simulation (CALVIN), not on real-world robots.
limits.zh: 仅在仿真环境（CALVIN）中评估，未在真实机器人上部署。

limits.en: Requires language-annotated demonstration data, which is scarce (only 1% of total data).
limits.zh: 需要语言标注的演示数据，此类数据稀缺（仅占总数据的1%）。

limits.en: Open-loop control performance degrades without retraining with jump step demonstrations.
limits.zh: 开环控制性能下降，除非使用跳步演示重新训练。

limits.en: Generalization to synonymous instructions drops for later tasks in sequence.
limits.zh: 对同义指令的泛化能力在序列后续任务中下降。

limits.en: Relies on OpenFlamingo backbone; performance may vary with other VLMs.
limits.zh: 依赖OpenFlamingo骨干网络，性能可能因其他视觉语言模型而异。

items.en: Recent progress in vision language foundation models has shown their ability to understand multimodal data and resolve complicated vision language tasks, including robotics manipulation. We seek a straightforward way of making use of existing vision-language models (VLMs) with simple fine-tuning on robotics data. To this end, we derive a simple and novel vision-language manipulation framework, dubbed RoboFlamingo, built upon the open-source VLMs, OpenFlamingo. Unlike prior works, RoboFlamingo utilizes pre-trained VLMs for single-step vision-language comprehension, models sequential history information with an explicit policy head, and is slightly fine-tuned by imitation learning only on language-conditioned manipulation datasets. Such a decomposition provides RoboFlamingo the flexibility for open-loop control and deployment on low-performance platforms. By exceeding the state-of-the-art performance with a large margin on the tested benchmark, we show that RoboFlamingo can be an effective and competitive alternative to adapt VLMs to robot control. Our extensive experimental results also reveal several interesting conclusions regarding the behavior of different pre-trained VLMs on manipulation tasks. RoboFlamingo can be trained or evaluated on a single GPU server, and we believe it has the potential to be a cost-effective and easy-to-use solution for robotics manipulation, empowering everyone with the ability to fine-tune their own robotics policy. Codes and models will be public.
items.zh: 视觉语言基础模型的最新进展表明，它们能够理解多模态数据并解决复杂的视觉语言任务，包括机器人操作。我们寻求一种直接的方法，利用现有的视觉语言模型（VLM），在机器人数据上进行简单的微调。为此，我们推导出一个简单而新颖的视觉语言操作框架，称为 RoboFlamingo，它基于开源 VLM OpenFlamingo。与先前的工作不同，RoboFlamingo 利用预训练的 VLM 进行单步视觉语言理解，用显式的策略头建模序列历史信息，并仅通过模仿学习在语言条件操作数据集上进行轻微微调。这种分解为 RoboFlamingo 提供了开环控制和在低性能平台上部署的灵活性。通过在测试基准上以较大优势超越最先进的性能，我们表明 RoboFlamingo 可以成为将 VLM 适应机器人控制的有效且具有竞争力的替代方案。我们广泛的实验结果还揭示了关于不同预训练 VLM 在操作任务上行为的一些有趣结论。RoboFlamingo 可以在单个 GPU 服务器上进行训练或评估，我们相信它有潜力成为一种经济高效且易于使用的机器人操作解决方案，使每个人都能微调自己的机器人策略。代码和模型将公开。

items.en: Recent progress in vision-language foundation models (VLM) has presented their exhilarating ability in modeling and aligning the representation of images and words, and the unlimited potential to resolve a wide range of downstream tasks with multi-modality data, for instance, visual question-answering (Li et al., 2023; Zhou et al., 2022), image captioning (Zeng et al., 2022; Wang et al., 2022; Li et al., 2021), human-agent interactions (Liu et al., 2022b; Oertel et al., 2020; Seaborn et al., 2021). These successes, undeniably, encourage people to imagine a generalist robot equipped with such a vision-language comprehension ability to interact naturally with humans and perform complex manipulation tasks.
items.zh: 视觉语言基础模型（VLM）的最新进展展示了它们在建模和对齐图像与单词表示方面的惊人能力，以及在解决多模态数据广泛下游任务方面的无限潜力，例如视觉问答（Li 等人，2023；Zhou 等人，2022）、图像描述（Zeng 等人，2022；Wang 等人，2022；Li 等人，2021）、人机交互（Liu 等人，2022b；Oertel 等人，2020；Seaborn 等人，2021）。这些成功无疑鼓励人们想象一个具有这种视觉语言理解能力的通用机器人，能够自然地与人类交互并执行复杂的操作任务。

items.en: Therefore, we aim to explore integrating vision-language foundation models to serve as robot manipulation policies. While there have been some previous studies that incorporated large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs) into robot systems as high-level planners (Ahn et al., 2022; Driess et al., 2023), making use of them directly for low-level control still poses challenges. Most VLMs are trained on static image-language pairs, whereas robotics tasks require video comprehension for closed-loop control. Additionally, VLM outputs primarily consist of language tokens, which significantly differ in representation compared to robot actions. A recent work (Brohan et al., 2023), namely Robotics Transformer 2 (RT-2), has demonstrated a possible solution for adapting VLMs to low-level robot control. However, democratizing such an expensive framework for all robotics practitioners proves difficult as it utilizes private models and necessitates co-fine-tuning on extensive vision-language data to fully showcase its effectiveness. Consequently, there is an urgent need for robot communities to have a low-cost alternative solution that effectively enables a robot manipulation policy with VLMs.
items.zh: 因此，我们旨在探索将视觉语言基础模型集成到机器人操作策略中。虽然已有一些先前研究将大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉语言模型（VLM）作为高层规划器集成到机器人系统中（Ahn 等人，2022；Driess 等人，2023），但直接利用它们进行低层控制仍然面临挑战。大多数 VLM 是在静态图像-语言对上训练的，而机器人任务需要视频理解以实现闭环控制。此外，VLM 输出主要由语言标记组成，这与机器人动作在表示上显著不同。最近的工作（Brohan 等人，2023），即 Robotics Transformer 2 (RT-2)，展示了一种将 VLM 适应低层机器人控制的可能解决方案。然而，将这种昂贵的框架普及给所有机器人从业者被证明是困难的，因为它使用私有模型，并且需要在大量视觉语言数据上进行共同微调才能充分展示其有效性。因此，机器人社区迫切需要一种低成本的替代解决方案，能够有效地用 VLM 实现机器人操作策略。

items.en: To this end, we introduce RoboFlamingo, a novel vision-language manipulation framework that leverages publicly accessible pre-trained VLMs to effectively construct manipulation policies for robotics. Specifically, RoboFlamingo is grounded upon the open-source VLM, OpenFlamingo (Awadalla et al., 2023), and resolves the challenge by decoupling visual-language understanding and decision-making. Unlike previous works, RoboFlamingo takes advantage of pre-trained VLMs mainly for understanding vision observations and language instructions at every decision step, models the historical features with an explicit policy head, and is fine-tuned solely on language-conditioned manipulation datasets using imitation learning. With such a decomposition, we only need to combine a small amount of robotics demonstration to adapt the model to downstream manipulation tasks, and RoboFlamingo also offers flexibility for open-loop control and deployment on low-performance platforms. Moreover, benefiting from the pre-training on extensive vision-language tasks, RoboFlamingo achieves state-of-the-art performance with a large margin over previous works, and generalizes well to zero-shot settings and environments. It is worth noting that RoboFlamingo can be trained or evaluated on a single GPU server. As a result, we believe RoboFlamingo can be a cost-effective yet high-performance solution for robot manipulation, empowering everyone with the ability to fine-tune their own robots with VLMs.
items.zh: 为此，我们引入了 RoboFlamingo，一种新颖的视觉语言操作框架，它利用公开可用的预训练 VLM 来有效构建机器人操作策略。具体来说，RoboFlamingo 基于开源 VLM OpenFlamingo（Awadalla 等人，2023），并通过解耦视觉语言理解和决策来解决挑战。与先前的工作不同，RoboFlamingo 利用预训练的 VLM 主要在每个决策步骤理解视觉观察和语言指令，用显式的策略头建模历史特征，并仅通过模仿学习在语言条件操作数据集上进行微调。通过这种分解，我们只需要结合少量机器人演示来使模型适应下游操作任务，并且 RoboFlamingo 还为开环控制和在低性能平台上部署提供了灵活性。此外，得益于在大量视觉语言任务上的预训练，RoboFlamingo 以较大优势超越了先前工作的最先进性能，并很好地泛化到零样本设置和环境。值得注意的是，RoboFlamingo 可以在单个 GPU 服务器上进行训练或评估。因此，我们相信 RoboFlamingo 可以成为机器人操作的一种经济高效且高性能的解决方案，使每个人都能用 VLM 微调自己的机器人。

items.en: Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that RoboFlamingo outperforms existing methods by a clear margin. Specifically, we evaluate its performance using the Composing Actions from Language and Vision benchmark (CALVIN) (Mees et al., 2022b), a widely-recognized simulation benchmark for long-horizon language-conditioned tasks. Our findings indicate that RoboFlamingo is an effective and competitive alternative for adapting VLMs to robot control, achieving 2x performance improvements compared with the previous state-of-the-art method. Our comprehensive results also yield valuable insights into the use of pre-trained VLMs for robot manipulation tasks, offering potential directions for further research and development.
items.zh: 通过大量实验，我们证明 RoboFlamingo 以明显优势优于现有方法。具体来说，我们使用语言和视觉组合动作基准（CALVIN）（Mees 等人，2022b）评估其性能，这是一个广泛认可的长时域语言条件任务模拟基准。我们的发现表明，RoboFlamingo 是将 VLM 适应机器人控制的有效且具有竞争力的替代方案，与先前的最先进方法相比，实现了 2 倍的性能提升。我们的全面结果也为使用预训练 VLM 进行机器人操作任务提供了宝贵的见解，为进一步的研究和开发提供了潜在方向。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Comparison among RoboFlamingo and existing vision-language manipulation solutions.
items.capZh: 图 1：RoboFlamingo 与现有视觉语言操作解决方案的比较。

items.en: Language can be the most intuitive and pivotal interface for human-robot interaction, enabling non-expert humans to seamlessly convey their instructions to robots for achieving diverse tasks. Consequently, the realm of language-conditioned multi-task manipulation has garnered substantial attention in recent years. Intuitively, such tasks require robots to have a good understanding of not only the visual captures of the outside world, but also the instructions represented by words. With the strong representation ability of pre-trained vision and language models, a lot of previous works have incorporated pre-trained models into the learning framework. Among them, we roughly classify them into the following three categories, which is also illustratively compared in Fig. 1.
items.zh: 语言可以成为人机交互最直观和关键的接口，使非专业人类能够无缝地向机器人传达指令以完成各种任务。因此，语言条件多任务操作领域近年来引起了广泛关注。直观地说，这些任务要求机器人不仅要很好地理解外部世界的视觉捕捉，还要理解由单词表示的指令。借助预训练视觉和语言模型的强大表示能力，许多先前的工作已将预训练模型纳入学习框架。其中，我们大致将它们分为以下三类，图 1 中也进行了比较说明。

items.en: While some early works such as Jang et al. (2022); Lynch & Sermanet (2020) trained a vision encoder and a language encoder to learn representations for the input language and vision data from manipulation tasks, some recent work directly takes pre-trained models to obtain great representations, then trains the policy model beyond them from scratch or fine-tuning the whole model. For instance, Jiang et al. (2023) utilizes a pre-trained T5 (Raffel et al., 2020) model to encode the multi-modal prompts, and learn the actions by fine-tuning the T5 model and additionally training an object encoder and attention layers. HULC (Mees et al., 2022a) utilizes the vision encoder of Lynch & Sermanet (2020) trained on the CALVIN dataset (Mees et al., 2022b) and some pre-trained language encoder models such as sentence transformer (Reimers & Gurevych, 2019), and their HULC++ (Mees et al., 2023) also fine-tunes these encoders. Besides, Brohan et al. (2022) proposed RT-1, i.e., robotics transformers, a 35M vision-language-action model (VLA) which tokenizes the action and aligns the vision, language, and action in the token space and is trained on a large amount of real-world manipulation dataset, using the Universal Sentence Encoder (Cer et al., 2018) to obtain the language embedding and the pre-trained EfficientNet-B3 (Tan & Le, 2019) as the vision tokenizer.
items.zh: 虽然一些早期工作如 Jang 等人（2022）；Lynch & Sermanet（2020）训练了视觉编码器和语言编码器来学习来自操作任务的输入语言和视觉数据的表示，但一些近期工作直接使用预训练模型获得良好的表示，然后从头训练策略模型或微调整个模型。例如，Jiang 等人（2023）利用预训练的 T5（Raffel 等人，2020）模型对多模态提示进行编码，并通过微调 T5 模型以及额外训练对象编码器和注意力层来学习动作。HULC（Mees 等人，2022a）利用在 CALVIN 数据集（Mees 等人，2022b）上训练的 Lynch & Sermanet（2020）的视觉编码器以及一些预训练的语言编码器模型（如句子变换器（Reimers & Gurevych，2019）），其 HULC++（Mees 等人，2023）也对这些编码器进行了微调。此外，Brohan 等人（2022）提出了 RT-1，即机器人变换器，一个 35M 的视觉语言动作模型（VLA），它将动作标记化并在标记空间中对齐视觉、语言和动作，并在大量真实世界操作数据集上进行训练，使用通用句子编码器（Cer 等人，2018）获取语言嵌入，并使用预训练的 EfficientNet-B3（Tan & Le，2019）作为视觉标记器。

items.en: Some approaches have exploited large language models (LLMs) as a powerful zero-shot planner, e.g., SayCan Ahn et al. (2022), to generate step-by-step pre-defined plans with human-interactive prompts on given tasks, subsequently instructing different pre-trained low-level skill policies to execute those plans and finish multiple tasks. Compared to other works, the controlling policies do not require any ability to understand instructions, but rely on the pre-trained frozen LLM to select necessary skills.
items.zh: 一些方法利用大型语言模型（LLM）作为强大的零样本规划器，例如 SayCan（Ahn 等人，2022），通过人类交互提示在给定任务上生成逐步预定义的计划，随后指示不同的预训练低层技能策略执行这些计划并完成多个任务。与其他工作相比，控制策略不需要任何理解指令的能力，而是依赖预训练的冻结 LLM 来选择必要的技能。

items.en: Driess et al. (2023) proposed 540B PaLM-E model, showing a different way of utilizing the pre-trained vision and language model. Specifically, they choose different pre-trained models to encode the input scene, and the PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022) model as the base model, train the model to generate pre-defined multi-step plans described by language by co-fine-tuning the whole VLM end-to-end using both mobile manipulation question-answering data and auxiliary vision-language training data such as image captioning and visual question answering data collected from the web. Similar to SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022), they require low-level control policies to execute the generated plans. Motivated by PaLM-E, Brohan et al. (2023) further introduced RT-2, which is based on RT-1 but is adapted to use large vision-language backbones like PaLI-X (Chen et al., 2023) and PaLM-E (Driess et al., 2023), training the policy utilizing both robot manipulation data and web data. Their method reveals that VLMs have the potential to be adapted into robot manipulation, yet their key co-fine-tuning training strategy requires a large amount of both web-scale data vision-language data and low-level robot actions. Additionally, the VLMs and the data they use are private, making it hard for every robotics practitioner to play on such a solution for their own.
items.zh: Driess 等人（2023）提出了 540B PaLM-E 模型，展示了利用预训练视觉和语言模型的不同方式。具体来说，他们选择不同的预训练模型来编码输入场景，并以 PaLM（Chowdhery 等人，2022）模型作为基础模型，通过使用移动操作问答数据和辅助视觉语言训练数据（如从网络收集的图像描述和视觉问答数据）共同端到端微调整个 VLM，训练模型生成由语言描述的预定义多步计划。与 SayCan（Ahn 等人，2022）类似，他们需要低层控制策略来执行生成的计划。受 PaLM-E 启发，Brohan 等人（2023）进一步引入了 RT-2，它基于 RT-1，但适应使用大型视觉语言骨干网络如 PaLI-X（Chen 等人，2023）和 PaLM-E（Driess 等人，2023），利用机器人操作数据和网络数据训练策略。他们的方法表明 VLM 有潜力适应机器人操作，但其关键的共同微调训练策略需要大量的网络规模视觉语言数据和低层机器人动作。此外，他们使用的 VLM 和数据是私有的，使得每个机器人从业者难以在自己的解决方案上使用。

items.en: Although these previous models somehow bridge the gap between vision and language on robot manipulation tasks, they either reply on low-level skill policies, like SayCan and PaLM-E; or train a whole large model, such as RT-1; or require a huge amount of vision-language data and computational resources to ensure the model learns the manipulation policy without forgetting the great alignment of vision and language. Compared with these works, our proposed RoboFlamingo is a simple and intuitive solution to easily adapt existing VLMs (OpenFlamingo (Alayrac et al., 2022; Awadalla et al., 2023) used in this paper), only requiring fine-tuning on a small number of manipulation demonstrations. We hope RoboFlamingo provides a different perspective on fully leveraging the ability of VLMs, while requiring less data collection costs and computing consumption to make it an open and easy-to-use solution for everyone.
items.zh: 尽管这些先前模型在某种程度上弥合了机器人操作任务中视觉和语言之间的差距，但它们要么依赖低层技能策略（如 SayCan 和 PaLM-E），要么训练整个大型模型（如 RT-1），要么需要大量的视觉语言数据和计算资源来确保模型在不遗忘视觉和语言良好对齐的情况下学习操作策略。与这些工作相比，我们提出的 RoboFlamingo 是一种简单直观的解决方案，可以轻松适应现有的 VLM（本文使用 OpenFlamingo（Alayrac 等人，2022；Awadalla 等人，2023）），仅需在少量操作演示上进行微调。我们希望 RoboFlamingo 提供一种不同的视角来充分利用 VLM 的能力，同时减少数据收集成本和计算消耗，使其成为每个人开放且易于使用的解决方案。

items.en: In this paper, we mainly consider robot manipulation tasks, where the agent (robot) does not have access to the ground-truth state of the environment, but visual observations from different cameras and its own proprioception states. As for the action space, it often includes the relative target pose and open/closed state of the gripper. For instance, in the testbed of CALVIN (Mees et al., 2022b), the observations consist of simulated camera captures from two different views, and the action is a 7-DoF control of a Franka Emika Panda robot arm with a parallel gripper, and the instructions are reaching goals, i.e., the after-the-fact descriptions.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们主要考虑机器人操作任务，其中智能体（机器人）无法访问环境的真实状态，但可以访问来自不同摄像头的视觉观察及其自身的本体感觉状态。至于动作空间，它通常包括相对目标姿态和夹爪的开合状态。例如，在 CALVIN（Mees 等人，2022b）的测试平台中，观察包括来自两个不同视角的模拟摄像头捕捉，动作是 Franka Emika Panda 机器人手臂带平行夹爪的 7 自由度控制，指令是达到目标，即事后描述。

items.en: Imitation learning (Pomerleau, 1988; Zhang et al., 2018; Liu et al., 2020; Jang et al., 2022) allows the agent to mimic the manipulation plans from instruction-labeled expert play data 𝒟={(τ,l)i}i=0D𝒟superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝜏𝑙𝑖𝑖0𝐷\mathcal{D}=\{(\tau,l)_{i}\}_{i=0}^{D}, where D𝐷D is the number of trajectories, l𝑙l is the language instruction, and τ={(ot,at)}𝜏subscript𝑜𝑡subscript𝑎𝑡\tau=\{(o_{t},a_{t})\} contains preceding states and actions to reach the goal described by the given instruction. The learning objective can be simply concluded as a maximum likelihood goal-conditioned imitation objective to learn the policy πθsubscript𝜋𝜃\pi_{\theta}:
items.zh: 模仿学习（Pomerleau，1988；Zhang 等人，2018；Liu 等人，2020；Jang 等人，2022）允许智能体从指令标记的专家演示数据 𝒟={(τ,l)i}i=0D 中模仿操作计划，其中 D 是轨迹数量，l 是语言指令，τ={(ot,at)} 包含达到给定指令描述目标的前序状态和动作。学习目标可以简单地归结为最大似然目标条件模仿目标，以学习策略 πθ：

items.capZh: 图 2：提出的 RoboFlamingo 框架示意图。Flamingo 骨干网络对单步观察进行建模，时间特征由策略头建模。

items.en: RoboFlamingo, a generalized robotics agent, excels in resolving language-conditioned manipulation tasks. The key idea is to draw help from pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) and adapt them to manipulation policies, acquiring the ability of object grounding, language comprehension, vision-language alignment, and long-horizon planning. Particularly, RoboFlamingo looks into one of the popular VLMs, Flamingo (Alayrac et al., 2022), and takes its open-source model OpenFlamingo (Awadalla et al., 2023) as the backbone. The overview of RoboFlamingo is shown in Fig. 2. To adapt large-scale vision-language models to robotic manipulation, RoboFlamingo simply adds a policy head for end-to-end finetuning. It addresses three main challenges: 1) it adapts vision-language models with static image inputs to video observations; 2) it generates robot control signals instead of text-only outputs; 3) it requires a limited amount of downstream robotic manipulation data to achieve high performance and generality with billions of trainable parameters. We will elaborate on the design of RoboFlamingo in this section.
items.zh: RoboFlamingo 是一个通用机器人智能体，擅长解决语言条件操作任务。关键思想是借助预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）并将其适应操作策略，获得物体定位、语言理解、视觉语言对齐和长时域规划的能力。特别地，RoboFlamingo 关注流行的 VLM 之一 Flamingo（Alayrac 等人，2022），并将其开源模型 OpenFlamingo（Awadalla 等人，2023）作为骨干网络。RoboFlamingo 的概览如图 2 所示。为了将大规模视觉语言模型适应机器人操作，RoboFlamingo 简单地添加了一个策略头用于端到端微调。它解决了三个主要挑战：1）将具有静态图像输入的视觉语言模型适应视频观察；2）生成机器人控制信号而非仅文本输出；3）需要有限数量的下游机器人操作数据，以实现具有数十亿可训练参数的高性能和泛化性。我们将在本节详细阐述 RoboFlamingo 的设计。

items.en: The problem of language-conditioned robot control can be modeled as a goal-conditioned partially observable Markov decision process (GC-POMDP) (Liu et al., 2022a): ℳ=⟨𝒮,𝒪,𝒜,𝒯,ρ0,ℒ,ϕ,f⟩ℳ𝒮𝒪𝒜𝒯subscript𝜌0ℒitalic-ϕ𝑓\mathcal{M}=\langle\mathcal{S},\mathcal{O},\mathcal{A},\mathcal{T},\rho_{0},\mathcal{L},\phi,f\rangle, where 𝒮𝒮\mathcal{S} and 𝒪𝒪\mathcal{O} are the set of states and observations separately, 𝒜𝒜\mathcal{A} is the action space, 𝒯:𝒮×𝒜→𝒮:𝒯→𝒮𝒜𝒮\mathcal{T}:\mathcal{S}\times\mathcal{A}\rightarrow\mathcal{S} is the environment dynamics function, ρ0:𝒮→[0,1]:subscript𝜌0→𝒮01\rho_{0}:\mathcal{S}\rightarrow[0,1] is the initial state distribution, ,ϕ(s),\phi(s) indicate if the task is successful, and f​(o|s):𝒮→𝒪:𝑓conditional𝑜𝑠→𝒮𝒪f(o|s):\mathcal{S}\rightarrow\mathcal{O} is the observation function. Specifically, for each controlling episode, the robot is given a goal, represented by a length-M𝑀M free-form language instruction l∈ℒ𝑙ℒl\in\mathcal{L} at every time step t𝑡t, and the observations otsubscript𝑜𝑡o_{t} are typically two images Itsubscript𝐼𝑡I_{t}, Gtsubscript𝐺𝑡G_{t} from a third-perspective camera and a gripper camera. The controlling policy can be modeled as a goal-conditioned policy π​(a|o,l):𝒮×ℒ→𝒜:𝜋conditional𝑎𝑜𝑙→𝒮ℒ𝒜\pi(a|o,l):\mathcal{S}\times\mathcal{L}\rightarrow\mathcal{A} and the action a𝑎a is typically the desired relative position and pose of the gripper, along with its open/close status.
items.zh: 语言条件机器人控制问题可以建模为目标条件部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（GC-POMDP）（Liu 等人，2022a）：ℳ=⟨𝒮,𝒪,𝒜,𝒯,ρ0,ℒ,ϕ,f⟩，其中 𝒮 和 𝒪 分别是状态和观察的集合，𝒜 是动作空间，𝒯:𝒮×𝒜→𝒮 是环境动态函数，ρ0:𝒮→[0,1] 是初始状态分布，ϕ(s) 指示任务是否成功，f(o|s):𝒮→𝒪 是观察函数。具体来说，对于每个控制回合，机器人在每个时间步 t 被给予一个目标，由长度为 M 的自由形式语言指令 l∈ℒ 表示，观察 ot 通常是来自第三视角摄像头和夹爪摄像头的两个图像 It, Gt。控制策略可以建模为目标条件策略 π(a|o,l):𝒮×ℒ→𝒜，动作 a 通常是夹爪的期望相对位置和姿态，以及其开合状态。

items.en: In our RoboFlamingo, the policy πθ​(a|o,l)subscript𝜋𝜃conditional𝑎𝑜𝑙\pi_{\theta}(a|o,l) is parameterized by θ𝜃\theta. It consists of a backbone based on Flamingo fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} and a policy head pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta}. The backbone takes visual observations and language-represented goals as the input and provides a latent fused representation at each time step for the policy head: Xt=fθ​(ot,l)subscript𝑋𝑡subscript𝑓𝜃subscript𝑜𝑡𝑙X_{t}=f_{\theta}(o_{t},l). Then the policy head further predicts the action to fulfill the specified goal for the robot: at=pθ​(Xt,ht−1)subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑝𝜃subscript𝑋𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡1a_{t}=p_{\theta}(X_{t},h_{t-1}), where ht−1subscriptℎ𝑡1h_{t-1} is the hidden state from the last step that encodes the history information for decision-making. We will introduce each module in detail in the following sections.
items.zh: 在我们的 RoboFlamingo 中，策略 πθ(a|o,l) 由 θ 参数化。它由基于 Flamingo 的骨干网络 fθ 和策略头 pθ 组成。骨干网络将视觉观察和语言表示的目标作为输入，并在每个时间步为策略头提供潜在融合表示：Xt=fθ(ot,l)。然后策略头进一步预测动作以完成机器人的指定目标：at=pθ(Xt,ht−1)，其中 ht−1 是来自上一步的隐藏状态，编码了用于决策的历史信息。我们将在以下各节中详细介绍每个模块。

items.en: We adopt the Flamingo backbone fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} for understanding the vision and language inputs at every decision step. Overall, Flamingo encodes the vision observations to the latent tokens by a vision encoder; and then fuses them with language goals through the feature fusion decoder. We explain these parts in detail below.
items.zh: 我们采用 Flamingo 骨干网络 fθ 来理解每个决策步骤的视觉和语言输入。总体而言，Flamingo 通过视觉编码器将视觉观察编码为潜在标记；然后通过特征融合解码器将它们与语言目标融合。我们在下面详细解释这些部分。

items.en: The vision encoder consists of a vision transformer (ViT) (Yuan et al., 2021) and a perceiver resampler (Alayrac et al., 2022). At every time step t𝑡t, the two-view camera images Itsubscript𝐼𝑡I_{t}, Gtsubscript𝐺𝑡G_{t} are encoded to X^tsubscript^𝑋𝑡\hat{X}_{t}, consisting of a visual token sequence, through the ViT module:
items.zh: 视觉编码器由视觉变换器（ViT）（Yuan 等人，2021）和感知器重采样器（Alayrac 等人，2022）组成。在每个时间步 t，两个视角的摄像头图像 It, Gt 通过 ViT 模块编码为 X^t，包含视觉标记序列：

items.en: where X^tv=(x^t​1v,⋯,x^t​Nv)subscriptsuperscript^𝑋𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscript^𝑥𝑡1𝑣⋯superscriptsubscript^𝑥𝑡𝑁𝑣\hat{X}^{v}_{t}=({\hat{x}_{t1}^{v},\cdots,\hat{x}_{tN}^{v}}) represents the visual token sequence at t𝑡t, N𝑁N represents the token number of the encoded output. After encoding, RoboFlamingo utilizes a perceiver resampler to compress the number of visual tokens from N𝑁N to Nrsubscript𝑁𝑟N_{r}. In detail, the resampler maintains a set of learnable parameters and utilizes the attention mechanism to reduce the number of token sequences to K𝐾K. Formally, the resampler is formulated as:

items.en: where QR∈ℝNr×dsubscript𝑄𝑅superscriptℝsubscript𝑁𝑟𝑑Q_{R}\in\mathbb{R}^{N_{r}\times d} corresponds to the learnable parameters of the resampler and serves as the query vector, d𝑑d is the hidden dimension size, WKR,WVR∈ℝdv×dsuperscriptsubscript𝑊𝐾𝑅superscriptsubscript𝑊𝑉𝑅superscriptℝsubscript𝑑𝑣𝑑W_{K}^{R},W_{V}^{R}\in\mathbb{R}^{d_{v}\times d} represents the linear transformation matrix of key and value, dvsubscript𝑑𝑣d_{v} is the feature dimension of the visual token, KRsubscript𝐾𝑅K_{R} and VRsubscript𝑉𝑅V_{R} are the transformed key and value vector of vision input V𝑉V.

items.en: The compressed visual tokens output from the resampler Xtv∈ℝNr×dsubscriptsuperscript𝑋𝑣𝑡superscriptℝsubscript𝑁𝑟𝑑X^{v}_{t}\in\mathbb{R}^{N_{r}\times d} are further passed to the feature fusion decoder, which is designed to generate the vision-language joint embedding by fusing the language instruction with the encoded vision feature Xtvsubscriptsuperscript𝑋𝑣𝑡X^{v}_{t}. In RoboFlamingo, we utilize the pre-trained decoder from OpenFlamingo (Awadalla et al., 2023) and fine-tune the decoder module following the way as in Awadalla et al. (2023). Specifically, the decoder consists of L𝐿L layers, each of which involves a transformer decoder layer and a cross-attention layer. The transformer layers are directly copied from a pre-trained language model (such as LlaMA (Touvron et al., 2023), GPT-Neox (Black et al., 2022) and MPT (Team et al., 2023)) and are frozen during the whole training process; the cross-attention layer takes the language token as query, and the encoded visual token as key and value, which is fine-tuned by imitation learning objectives on manipulation data (see following sub-sections). Formally, if we denote xi∈ℝdsubscript𝑥𝑖superscriptℝ𝑑x_{i}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} the i−th𝑖thi-\text{th} embedded token of the instruction, M𝑀M the instruction length, and X∈ℝM×d𝑋superscriptℝ𝑀𝑑X\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times d} is the embedded matrix of the instruction, then the embedded natural language instruction should be X=(x1,x2,⋯,xMX=(x_{1},x_{2},\cdots,x_{M}) and output Xtl+1subscriptsuperscript𝑋𝑙1𝑡X^{l+1}_{t} of the l𝑙l-th decoder layer given the input Xtlsubscriptsuperscript𝑋𝑙𝑡X^{l}_{t} is computed by:
items.zh: 从重采样器输出的压缩视觉 token Xtv∈ℝNr×d 进一步传递到特征融合解码器，该解码器旨在通过将语言指令与编码后的视觉特征 Xtv 融合，生成视觉-语言联合嵌入。在 RoboFlamingo 中，我们使用来自 OpenFlamingo (Awadalla et al., 2023) 的预训练解码器，并按照 Awadalla et al. (2023) 的方式微调解码器模块。具体来说，解码器由 L 层组成，每层包含一个 Transformer 解码器层和一个交叉注意力层。Transformer 层直接复制自预训练语言模型（如 LlaMA (Touvron et al., 2023)、GPT-Neox (Black et al., 2022) 和 MPT (Team et al., 2023)），并在整个训练过程中冻结；交叉注意力层以语言 token 为查询，以编码后的视觉 token 为键和值，通过操作数据上的模仿学习目标进行微调（见后续小节）。形式上，若记 xi∈ℝd 为指令的第 i 个嵌入 token，M 为指令长度，X∈ℝM×d 为指令的嵌入矩阵，则嵌入的自然语言指令为 X=(x1,x2,⋯,xM)，第 l 层解码器在输入 Xtl 下的输出 Xtl+1 计算如下：

items.en: where Xt1=Xsuperscriptsubscript𝑋𝑡1𝑋X_{t}^{1}=X, X^tlsuperscriptsubscript^𝑋𝑡𝑙\hat{X}_{t}^{l} corresponds to the output of the gated cross-attention layer at time instant t𝑡t, WQC,WKC,WVC∈ℝd×dsuperscriptsubscript𝑊𝑄𝐶superscriptsubscript𝑊𝐾𝐶superscriptsubscript𝑊𝑉𝐶superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑W_{Q}^{C},W_{K}^{C},W_{V}^{C}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d} represents the learnable parameters of the cross-attention layer. α∈ℝ𝛼ℝ\alpha\in\mathbb{R} is a learnable gate parameter to control the mixing weights for stability. WQS,WKS,WVS∈ℝd×dsuperscriptsubscript𝑊𝑄𝑆superscriptsubscript𝑊𝐾𝑆superscriptsubscript𝑊𝑉𝑆superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑W_{Q}^{S},W_{K}^{S},W_{V}^{S}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d} represents the parameters of the self-attention layer and MLP represents a multi-layer perceptron network. With the deep interaction of the vision and language token, we expect the output Xt=XtL={xt,1L,xt,2L,⋯,xt,ML}subscript𝑋𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝑋𝐿𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑥𝑡1𝐿superscriptsubscript𝑥𝑡2𝐿⋯superscriptsubscript𝑥𝑡𝑀𝐿X_{t}=X^{L}_{t}=\{x_{t,1}^{L},x_{t,2}^{L},\cdots,x_{t,M}^{L}\} at time step t𝑡t to be an informative vision-language joint embedding for robot manipulation.
items.zh: 其中 Xt1=X，X^tl 对应 t 时刻门控交叉注意力层的输出，WQC,WKC,WVC∈ℝd×d 表示交叉注意力层的可学习参数。α∈ℝ 是可学习的门控参数，用于控制混合权重以保证稳定性。WQS,WKS,WVS∈ℝd×d 表示自注意力层的参数，MLP 表示多层感知机网络。通过视觉和语言 token 的深度交互，我们期望 t 时刻的输出 Xt=XtL={xt,1L,xt,2L,⋯,xt,ML} 成为用于机器人操作的富有信息的视觉-语言联合嵌入。

items.en: The output XtLsubscriptsuperscript𝑋𝐿𝑡X^{L}_{t} from the feature fusion decoder is trained as the representation of the vision observation and language instruction, which will be further translated into low-level control signals. To achieve this, we simply adopt an additional policy head pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} to predict the action, e.g., the 7 DoF end-effector pose and gripper status. We test various strategies to model the historical observation sequences and behave as the policy head, e.g., a long short-term memory (LSTM) (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997) network with an MLP for the final prediction; a decoder-only transformer (Brown et al., 2020) similarly with an MLP; or a single MLP that only models single-step information (see Section 5 for more details). Taking the LSTM version as an example, with the vision-language joint embedding sequence XtLsuperscriptsubscript𝑋𝑡𝐿X_{t}^{L}, we obtain an aggregated embedding through a max-pooling operation over the token dimension and predict the action as:
items.zh: 来自特征融合解码器的输出 XtL 被训练为视觉观测和语言指令的表示，并将进一步转化为低级控制信号。为此，我们简单地采用额外的策略头 pθ 来预测动作，例如 7 自由度末端执行器位姿和夹爪状态。我们测试了多种策略来建模历史观测序列并作为策略头，例如：长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997) 加 MLP 进行最终预测；仅解码器的 Transformer (Brown et al., 2020) 同样加 MLP；或仅建模单步信息的单个 MLP（详见第 5 节）。以 LSTM 版本为例，利用视觉-语言联合嵌入序列 XtL，我们通过 token 维度上的最大池化操作获得聚合嵌入，并预测动作如下：

items.en: where htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} represents the hidden state at t𝑡t, and atp​o​s​e,atg​r​i​p​p​e​rsubscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑒𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑔𝑟𝑖𝑝𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑡a^{pose}_{t},a^{gripper}_{t} are the predicted end-effector pose and gripper status.
items.zh: 其中 ht 表示 t 时刻的隐藏状态，atpose,atgripper 是预测的末端执行器位姿和夹爪状态。

items.en: We utilize maximum likelihood imitation learning objectives to fine-tune the proposed pre-trained backbone and the policy head. Concretely, the desired relative pose is optimized via regression loss (we use mean squared error (MSE) loss) and the gripper status uses classification loss (we use binary cross-entropy (BCE) loss):
items.zh: 我们使用最大似然模仿学习目标来微调所提出的预训练主干和策略头。具体地，期望的相对位姿通过回归损失（我们使用均方误差损失）优化，夹爪状态使用分类损失（我们使用二元交叉熵损失）优化：

items.en: where a^tp​o​s​e,a^tg​r​i​p​p​e​rsubscriptsuperscript^𝑎𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑒𝑡subscriptsuperscript^𝑎𝑔𝑟𝑖𝑝𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑡\hat{a}^{pose}_{t},\hat{a}^{gripper}_{t} is the demonstration for end effector pose and gripper status at timestep t𝑡t, λg​r​i​p​p​e​rsubscript𝜆𝑔𝑟𝑖𝑝𝑝𝑒𝑟\lambda_{gripper} corresponds to the weight of gripper loss.
items.zh: 其中 a^tpose,a^tgripper 是时间步 t 时末端执行器位姿和夹爪状态的示范，λgripper 对应夹爪损失的权重。

items.en: In the training procedure, we follow the fine-tuning paradigm of OpenFlamingo by only training the parameters of the resampler, the gated cross-attention module of each decoder layer, and the policy head while freezing all other parameters.
items.zh: 在训练过程中，我们遵循 OpenFlamingo 的微调范式，仅训练重采样器参数、每个解码器层的门控交叉注意力模块以及策略头，而冻结所有其他参数。

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to examine the proposed RoboFlamingo solution, and answer how pre-trained VL models (VLMs) benefit language-conditioned robotic manipulation. In short, we investigate RoboFlamingo from the following perspectives:
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验来检验所提出的 RoboFlamingo 方案，并回答预训练视觉语言模型如何有益于语言条件下的机器人操作。简而言之，我们从以下角度研究 RoboFlamingo：

items.en: Effectiveness. We wonder the imitation learning performance of RoboFlamingo by training it on the given demonstration data.
items.zh: 有效性。我们通过在给定的示范数据上训练 RoboFlamingo，研究其模仿学习性能。

items.en: Zero-shot Generalization. We focus on generalization on unseen tasks. In other words, we study how the model will behave given unseen vision contexts like different objects, even with unseen instructions.
items.zh: 零样本泛化。我们关注在未见任务上的泛化能力。换句话说，我们研究模型在面对未见视觉上下文（如不同物体）甚至未见指令时的表现。

items.en: Ablation Studies. We further explore the essential factors that matter in adapting VLMs to robot control policy in the framework of RoboFlamingo.
items.zh: 消融研究。我们进一步探索在 RoboFlamingo 框架中将视觉语言模型适应于机器人控制策略的关键因素。

items.en: We choose CALVIN (Mees et al., 2022b), an open-source simulated benchmark to learn long-horizon language-conditioned tasks, as our testbed, and the corresponding datasets as our imitation learning demonstration data. CALVIN encompasses a total of 34 distinct tasks and evaluates 1000 unique instruction chains for sequential tasks. In each experiment, the robot is required to successfully complete sequences of up to five language instructions consecutively. The policy for each consecutive task is dependent on a goal instruction, and the agent advances to the subsequent goal only if it successfully accomplishes the current task. The dataset contains four splits for environments A, B, C, and D. Each consists of 6 hours of human-teleoperated recording data (more than 2 million steps) that might contain sub-optimal behavior, and only 1% of that data is annotated with language instructions (∼similar-to\sim24 thousand steps). See Fig. 4 in Appendix A.1 for a more detailed description and visualized examples of the benchmark.
items.zh: 我们选择 CALVIN (Mees et al., 2022b) 作为测试平台，这是一个用于学习长时域语言条件任务的开源模拟基准，相应的数据集作为我们的模仿学习示范数据。CALVIN 总共包含 34 个不同任务，并评估 1000 个用于序列任务的独特指令链。在每个实验中，机器人需要连续成功完成最多五个语言指令的序列。每个连续任务的策略依赖于目标指令，只有当当前任务成功完成时，智能体才会进入下一个目标。数据集包含环境 A、B、C 和 D 的四个分割。每个分割包含 6 小时的人类远程操作记录数据（超过 200 万步），其中可能包含次优行为，且只有 1% 的数据带有语言指令注释（约 2.4 万步）。详见附录 A.1 中的图 4，其中提供了基准的更详细描述和可视化示例。

items.en: We compare a set of well-performed baselines in CALVIN: (1) MCIL (Lynch & Sermanet, 2020): a scalable framework combining multitask imitation with free-form text conditioning, which learns language-conditioned visuomotor policies, and is capable of following multiple human instructions over a long horizon in a dynamically accurate 3D tabletop setting. (2) HULC (Mees et al., 2022a): a hierarchical method that combines different observation and action spaces, auxiliary losses, and latent representations, which achieved the SoTA performance on CALVIN. (3) RT-1 (Brohan et al., 2022): robotics transformer, which directly predicts the controlling actions by action tokens, as well as vision and language inputs. RT-2 (Brohan et al., 2023) is not experimentally compared since we have no access to their code, data, and model weights.
items.zh: 我们在 CALVIN 上比较了一组表现良好的基线方法：(1) MCIL (Lynch & Sermanet, 2020)：一个可扩展的框架，结合了多任务模仿和自由形式文本条件，学习语言条件下的视觉运动策略，能够在动态精确的 3D 桌面环境中长时间遵循多个人类指令。(2) HULC (Mees et al., 2022a)：一种层次化方法，结合了不同的观测和动作空间、辅助损失和潜在表示，在 CALVIN 上达到了最先进的性能。(3) RT-1 (Brohan et al., 2022)：机器人 Transformer，通过动作 token 以及视觉和语言输入直接预测控制动作。由于无法访问其代码、数据和模型权重，未对 RT-2 (Brohan et al., 2023) 进行实验比较。

items.en: We train RoboFlamingo (with the M-3B-IFT backbone) using demonstrations only with language annotation from all 4 splits (A, B, C, and D), and evaluate the imitation performance on episodes sampled on split D (A​B​C​D→D→𝐴𝐵𝐶𝐷𝐷ABCD\rightarrow D).The performance comparison is shown in Tab. 1. RoboFlamingo outperforms all baseline methods over all metrics by a large margin, even for those methods that are trained on the full set of data. This demonstrates the effectiveness of RoboFlamingo as the solution for robotics manipulation, enabling VLMs to become effective robot imitators.
items.zh: 我们使用来自所有 4 个分割（A、B、C 和 D）的带有语言注释的示范训练 RoboFlamingo（使用 M-3B-IFT 主干），并在分割 D 上采样的情节上评估模仿性能（ABCD→D）。性能比较如表 1 所示。RoboFlamingo 在所有指标上大幅优于所有基线方法，甚至包括那些在完整数据集上训练的方法。这证明了 RoboFlamingo 作为机器人操作解决方案的有效性，使视觉语言模型成为有效的机器人模仿者。

items.en: In addition, the success rate of the subsequent tasks can be regarded as a notion of the generalizability of the manipulation policies, since the initial state of a subsequent task highly relies on the ending state of its former task. The later a task is arranged in the task sequence, the more diverse its initial state is, which will need more powerful visual-language alignment abilities to successfully complete the task. Among all methods, RoboFlamingo achieves the highest success rate over the latter tasks. This demonstrates that RoboFlamingo is able to utilize the visual-language grounding ability of pre-trained VLMs. In the appendix, we further include the results of RoboFlamingo co-trained with COCO and VQA data (Appendix B.1) and compare with recent robotics representation works (Appendix B.2). Appendix B.1 also reveals how the original VL abilities change after fine-tuning.
items.zh: 此外，后续任务的成功率可视为操作策略泛化能力的一个指标，因为后续任务的初始状态高度依赖于前一个任务的结束状态。任务在序列中安排得越靠后，其初始状态越多样化，这就需要更强的视觉-语言对齐能力才能成功完成任务。在所有方法中，RoboFlamingo 在后续任务上取得了最高的成功率。这表明 RoboFlamingo 能够利用预训练视觉语言模型的视觉-语言基础能力。在附录中，我们进一步包含了 RoboFlamingo 与 COCO 和 VQA 数据共同训练的结果（附录 B.1），并与最近的机器人表示工作进行比较（附录 B.2）。附录 B.1 还揭示了微调后原始视觉语言能力的变化。

items.en: To assess the zero-shot generalization ability, we evaluate RoboFlamingo in two aspects: vision and language. For vision generalization, we train models on splits A, B, and C and test on split D, which presents a different vision context. Our method significantly outperforms baselines in this vision generalization scenario (A​B​C→D→𝐴𝐵𝐶𝐷ABC\rightarrow D), as shown in Tab. 1. Regarding language generalization, we enrich the language setting by generating 50 synonymous instructions for each task using GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023). We then randomly sample instructions during evaluation. Our method exhibits superior performance compared to all baselines in this language generalization setting.
items.zh: 为了评估零样本泛化能力，我们从视觉和语言两个方面评估 RoboFlamingo。对于视觉泛化，我们在分割 A、B 和 C 上训练模型，并在呈现不同视觉上下文的 D 分割上测试。我们的方法在这种视觉泛化场景（ABC→D）中显著优于基线，如表 1 所示。对于语言泛化，我们通过使用 GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023) 为每个任务生成 50 个同义指令来丰富语言设置。然后在评估过程中随机采样指令。我们的方法在这种语言泛化设置中表现出优于所有基线的性能。

items.en: Note that the success rate of RoboFlamingo on subsequent tasks dropped more than HULC does. This may be due to our approach directly using word tokens as input during training, which can result in larger variations for synonymous sentences compared to HULC using a frozen sentence model for embedding instructions. To address this, we freeze the embedding layer of the feature fusion decoder in our method, leading to improved generalization and reduced performance drop.
items.zh: 注意，RoboFlamingo 在后续任务上的成功率下降幅度大于 HULC。这可能是由于我们的方法在训练时直接使用词 token 作为输入，这可能导致同义句的变异性比 HULC 使用冻结句子模型嵌入指令时更大。为了解决这个问题，我们冻结了方法中特征融合解码器的嵌入层，从而提高了泛化能力并减少了性能下降。

items.en: In this section, we conduct ablation studies for RoboFlamingo to answer the following questions:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对 RoboFlamingo 进行消融研究，以回答以下问题：

items.en: 1) How does RoboFlamingo perform with different policy heads/formulations?
items.zh: 1) RoboFlamingo 在不同策略头/公式下的表现如何？

items.en: 2) Does vision-language (VL) pre-training improve downstream robotic tasks?
items.zh: 2) 视觉-语言（VL）预训练是否能提升下游机器人任务？

items.en: 3) How do critical factors in VL pre-training affect robotic tasks?
items.zh: 3) VL预训练中的关键因素如何影响机器人任务？

items.en: We test RoboFlamingo with different policy heads/formulations. In particular, we compare 4 different implementations: (a) M​L​P​w/o​h​i​s​t𝑀𝐿𝑃𝑤𝑜ℎ𝑖𝑠𝑡MLP\ w/o\ hist takes only the current observation as input to predict actions, which ignores the observation history. (b) M​L​P​w​h​i​s​t𝑀𝐿𝑃𝑤ℎ𝑖𝑠𝑡MLP\ w\ hist takes the history frames into the vision encoder with position embedding, and encodes the history information through the cross-attention layers in the feature fusion decoder. (c) G​P​T𝐺𝑃𝑇GPT and (d) L​S​T​M𝐿𝑆𝑇𝑀LSTM both utilize the VLM backbone to process single-frame observations and integrate the history with the policy head. G​P​T𝐺𝑃𝑇GPT explicitly takes the visual history as input to predict the next action. L​S​T​M𝐿𝑆𝑇𝑀LSTM implicitly maintains a hidden state to encode memory and predict the action. See Appendix C.1 for detailed illustration. We compare their best performance on the A​B​C​D→D→𝐴𝐵𝐶𝐷𝐷ABCD\rightarrow D setting in Fig. 3 (a). M​L​P​w/o​h​i​s​t𝑀𝐿𝑃𝑤𝑜ℎ𝑖𝑠𝑡MLP\ w/o\ hist performs the worst, indicating the importance of the history information in the manipulation task. M​L​P​w​h​i​s​t𝑀𝐿𝑃𝑤ℎ𝑖𝑠𝑡MLP\ w\ hist performs better than M​L​P​w/o​h​i​s​t𝑀𝐿𝑃𝑤𝑜ℎ𝑖𝑠𝑡MLP\ w/o\ hist, but is still much worse than G​P​T𝐺𝑃𝑇GPT and L​S​T​M𝐿𝑆𝑇𝑀LSTM. We hypothesize that this may stem from the fact that the VLM (OpenFlamingo) has only seen image-text pairs during pre-training and cannot process consequent frames effectively. Further, the performance of G​P​T𝐺𝑃𝑇GPT and L​S​T​M𝐿𝑆𝑇𝑀LSTM are similar, we choose L​S​T​M𝐿𝑆𝑇𝑀LSTM as the default choice due to its simplicity.
items.zh: 我们使用不同的策略头/公式测试RoboFlamingo。具体来说，我们比较了4种不同的实现：(a) MLP w/o hist仅将当前观测作为输入来预测动作，忽略了观测历史。(b) MLP w hist将历史帧与位置嵌入一起输入视觉编码器，并通过特征融合解码器中的交叉注意力层编码历史信息。(c) GPT和(d) LSTM均利用VLM骨干网络处理单帧观测，并通过策略头整合历史信息。GPT明确将视觉历史作为输入来预测下一个动作。LSTM隐式维护一个隐藏状态来编码记忆并预测动作。详细说明见附录C.1。我们在图3(a)中的ABCD→D设置下比较它们的最佳性能。MLP w/o hist表现最差，表明历史信息在操作任务中的重要性。MLP w hist优于MLP w/o hist，但仍远差于GPT和LSTM。我们推测这可能源于VLM（OpenFlamingo）在预训练期间仅见过图像-文本对，无法有效处理连续帧。此外，GPT和LSTM的性能相似，我们选择LSTM作为默认选择，因其简单性。

items.en: To verify the necessity of VL pre-training, we train the same model without loading the pre-trained parameters of the cross-attention layers and the resampler trained by OpenFlamingo models (denoted as No VL Pre-train). Besides, we also conduct an ablation study to freeze the pre-trained VLM and only train the policy head (denoted as No VL Finetune). As shown in Fig. 3 (b), we can see that vision-language pre-training crucially improves the downstream robotic manipulation by a large margin. Besides, tuning on the VL model itself on robotic tasks is indispensable due to the limited capacity of the policy head.
items.zh: 为了验证VL预训练的必要性，我们训练了相同的模型，但不加载OpenFlamingo模型预训练的交叉注意力层和重采样器参数（记为No VL Pre-train）。此外，我们还进行了消融研究，冻结预训练的VLM，仅训练策略头（记为No VL Finetune）。如图3(b)所示，视觉-语言预训练显著提升了下游机器人操作性能。此外，由于策略头容量有限，在机器人任务上对VL模型本身进行微调是必不可少的。

items.en: A larger model usually results in better VL performance. Yet, with full training data in CALVIN, we find that the smaller model is competitive with the larger model (see the comparison in Tab. 2 and Appendix B.4). To further validate the impact of model size on downstream robotic tasks, we train different variants with 10% of language annotated data in CALVIN, which is only 0.1% of the full data. From Tab. 3 we can observe that with limited training data, the performance of VLMs is highly related to the model size. The larger model achieves much higher performance, indicating that a larger VLM can be more data-efficient.
items.zh: 更大的模型通常带来更好的VL性能。然而，在CALVIN的完整训练数据下，我们发现较小模型与较大模型具有竞争力（见表2和附录B.4的比较）。为了进一步验证模型大小对下游机器人任务的影响，我们使用CALVIN中10%的语言标注数据（仅为完整数据的0.1%）训练不同变体。从表3可以看出，在有限训练数据下，VLM的性能与模型大小高度相关。更大的模型实现了更高的性能，表明更大的VLM可以更高效地利用数据。

items.en: Instruction fine-tuning. Instruction-Finetuning is a specialized technique that utilizes a further pre-training enhancement on the LLM with the IFT dataset (Conover et al., 2023; Peng et al., 2023), which provides a rich repertoire of instruction-following behaviors that inform its capabilities in language-conditioned tasks. We find that LLMs with such a training stage can improve the performance of the policy in both seen and unseen scenarios, revealed by the performance improvements of M-3B-IFT against M-3B, and G-4B-IFT against G-4B shown in Tab. 2.
items.zh: 指令微调。指令微调是一种专门技术，利用IFT数据集（Conover等人，2023；Peng等人，2023）对LLM进行进一步的预训练增强，提供了丰富的指令遵循行为，从而增强其在语言条件任务中的能力。我们发现，经过此训练阶段的LLM在已见和未见场景中都能提升策略性能，如表2中M-3B-IFT相对于M-3B、G-4B-IFT相对于G-4B的性能提升所示。

items.en: Since our RoboFlamingo adopts a structure that separates the perception and policy module and leaves the main computation on the perception module, we could perform open loop control to accelerate the inference of RoboFlamingo. Instead of taking only the next action to execute and performing VLM inference every time for new observations to predict future actions, open-loop control can be achieved by predicting an action sequence (stacked actions) with only one inference given the current observation, therefore alleviating the delay and the test-time computing requirement. However, as indicated in Fig. 3 (c), directly implementing open loop control without re-training may lead to deteriorated performance, retraining the model with jump step demonstration could alleviate the performance drop.
items.zh: 由于我们的RoboFlamingo采用分离感知和策略模块的结构，并将主要计算放在感知模块上，我们可以执行开环控制以加速RoboFlamingo的推理。开环控制不是每次仅执行下一个动作并在新观测时进行VLM推理以预测未来动作，而是通过仅一次推理根据当前观测预测动作序列（堆叠动作），从而减轻延迟和测试时计算需求。然而，如图3(c)所示，直接实施开环控制而不重新训练可能导致性能下降，使用跳跃步演示重新训练模型可以缓解性能下降。

items.en: This paper explores the potential of pre-trained vision-language models in advancing language-conditioned robotic manipulation. Our proposed RoboFlamingo, based on the pre-trained OpenFlamingo model, showcases state-of-the-art performance on a benchmark dataset. Moreover, our experimental findings highlight the benefits of pre-trained models in terms of data efficiency and zero-shot generalization ability. This research contributes to the ongoing efforts to develop intelligent robotic systems that can seamlessly understand and respond to human language instructions, paving the way for more intuitive and efficient human-robot collaboration. Due to the lack of real-robot data, this paper does not deploy on real-world robotics. To our delight, recent progress on large-scale real robotics data (Padalkar et al., 2023) has shown the potential of fine-tuning large VLMs for real robots, and the most exciting future work is to see how RoboFlamingo will behave in real-world tasks combined with such amount of data.
items.zh: 本文探讨了预训练视觉-语言模型在推进语言条件机器人操作方面的潜力。我们提出的RoboFlamingo基于预训练的OpenFlamingo模型，在基准数据集上展示了最先进的性能。此外，我们的实验发现突显了预训练模型在数据效率和零样本泛化能力方面的优势。这项研究为开发能够无缝理解和响应人类语言指令的智能机器人系统做出了贡献，为更直观高效的人机协作铺平了道路。由于缺乏真实机器人数据，本文未在真实机器人上部署。令人欣慰的是，近期大规模真实机器人数据（Padalkar等人，2023）的进展显示了微调大型VLM用于真实机器人的潜力，最令人兴奋的未来工作是结合如此大量的数据，观察RoboFlamingo在真实世界任务中的表现。
